title: Centrostachys australis
taxonomy: Centrostachys australis is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to South America, specifically in the Andean regions of Argentina and Chile. The plant is classified within the genus Centrostachys, which is part of the larger family Acanthaceae. This family comprises over 2,000 species of flowering plants, many of which are native to tropical and subtropical regions worldwide. Centrostachys australis is a relatively rare and understudied species.
